content: JavaFX ScrollEvent: deltaY gives scroll amount in pixels, isControlDown() checks Ctrl key. Event is delivered to top-most picked node at cursor location, independent of focus. Mouse wheel generates one-time SCROLL event (no STARTED/FINISHED). Event filters (addEventFilter) run during capture phase before handlers. To prevent scroll inside ScrollPane while Ctrl is held, use addEventFilter on the scene and consume the event. Important: using setOnScroll (handler/bubbling phase) vs addEventFilter (capture phase) - filter is needed for ScrollPane contexts.
